notes: Phase 4/5 (Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic + The Ruby Sanctum) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Enhancement Shaman gear guide (anchor phase-5-best-in-slot-table). Dual-wields two Havoc's Call, Blade of Lordaeron Kings (or the Royal Scepter as a ranked alternative). Tier set: Sanctified Frost Witch's line, competing with several non-tier drops per slot. Rings/Trinkets split into two named slots with the top pick in slot 1.
